keyPoints: Co-author of 'Artificial Intelligence: A Modern Approach' (AIMA), the leading textbook in the field
Pioneer in unifying different AI approaches (e.g., neural networks with symbolic reasoning)
commonMistakes: Confusing Peter Norvig with other AI pioneers like Stuart Russell (his co-author) or Ray Kurzweil
Attributing the invention of a specific algorithm to him rather than his role in popularizing and synthesizing AI knowledge
